work_unit: fix(config): robust .env parser for values with = and mixed quotes (audit M-004)
situation: audit-2026-07-06-021 finding M-004 pending. load_env() used chained strip('"').strip("'") which corrupted base64 keys (trailing '=' stripped), mixed-quote secrets (residual quote chars like "it's"), and inline-commented values ('# comment' kept as data). Route-fix kind, minimal single-file change.
action: Edited personal_assistant/config.py in worktree opt-personal-assistant-1783341897 (case-104 escape hatch: direct edit + wt-internal commit since cp-guard would skip clean file). New logic: only strip matching outer quotes; handle ' #'/tab+# inline comments; preserve '#' mid-value; skip empty keys. Zero-dependency, backward compatible. Committed + pushed to origin.
outcome_evidence: Commit 2e29b6f on auto/opt-personal-assistant-1783341897; pushed to origin (new branch); git diff shows 21 insertions / 2 deletions in load_env(); function signature/exports unchanged — drop-in compatible.
next_suggestion: Next pending finding: M-005 relay_bridge.py:107 Origin validation bypass when Origin header absent. After M-005 merged/rejected, audit-cycle-state.status → cycle-complete → next full audit.

audit_findings.remediation: Only strip matching outer quotes; parse inline comments; skip empty keys
